title: Anyone Read Watch Deadman Wonderland
wikitext:
[]: Anyone Read/Watch Deadman Wonderland?             Quote Post by SaVaGe » Thu Sep 01, 2011 5:16 pm It's pretty intersting. I had read the first couple of chapters and never got into it, but now that it's been made into an anime, I thought I might as well watch it. Anyway, my point is, the protagonist of the series is a kid named Ganta, hurled against his will into a terrible situation in which he has to fight in order to survive. He's very submissive, in his head a lot, and what one would consider "weak". A lot like Shinji. It's a regular motif in the series that he mutters to himself, "I wanna live. I wanna live." and so on. This reminded me quite a bit of Shinji's, "I musn't run away" statement. The similarities don't run all that deep, but I guess I felt like sharing. Do any other readers/watchers relate Ganta to Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Sep 01, 2011 10:59 pm I watched the anime. There was some good in it, but it was largely awful.

[]:             Quote Post by SaVaGe » Fri Sep 02, 2011 5:22 pm It's pretty weird and the character designs are a bit awkward, but there are no ongoing animes that hold my interst these days. Deadman's something to watch. Plus I seem to be attracted to cowardly protagonists.

Anyway, my point is, the protagonist of the series is a kid named Ganta, hurled against his will into a terrible situation in which he has to fight in order to survive.

Article: Anyone Read Watch Deadman Wonderland
[]: Anyone Read/Watch Deadman Wonderland?             Quote Post by SaVaGe » Thu Sep 01, 2011 5:16 pm It's pretty intersting. I had read the first couple of chapters and never got into it, but now that it's been made into an anime, I thought I might as well watch it. Anyway, my point is, the protagonist of the series is a kid named Ganta, hurled against his will into a terrible situation in which he has to fight in order to survive. He's very submissive, in his head a lot, and what one would consider "weak". A lot like Shinji. It's a regular motif in the series that he mutters to himself, "I wanna live. I wanna live." and so on. This reminded me quite a bit of Shinji's, "I musn't run away" statement. The similarities don't run all that deep, but I guess I felt like sharing. Do any other readers/watchers relate Ganta to Shinji?
